label: 4 palette-cycling lights (cusp 4→5 weighting) + centroid tracker for camera lookat
context:
Replace temporary light_test with the proven 4-light palette-cycling rig (per attractor_chamber). Light colors weighted toward heavy cusp 4→5 register: wine magenta, petrol/oxidized teal, bronze patina/oxidized copper, deep purple range. Each light cycles between two palette colors over a prime-period (47/67/53/60 sec) so cycles never sync.

Add centroid_tracker executeDAT with EMA-lerp on lookat_target (alpha=0.04, ~0.4s cinematic time constant) — Aizawa's mass-center wanders, fixed lookat causes camera drift. Pattern proven in attractor_chamber.

operations.before: single basic lightCOMP at (2,2,2), placeholder from move_001

operations.notes: Color cycle expression on each cr/cg/cb par: 'a + (b-a) * (0.5 + 0.5 * sin(absTime.seconds * 2π / period))'. Color params are cr/cg/cb (NOT lightcolorr/g/b — fixed during build). Light positions form a tetrahedral arrangement so the cloud is lit from 4 angles.
Glob pattern matches all 4 light_* COMPs. Per gotcha: par.lights is a glob pattern, full paths silently work for single light only.

geometryCOMP used as empty transform anchor (baseCOMP has no tx/ty/tz; containerCOMP is panel-only). render=False, display=False, default torus child destroyed. Updated each frame by centroid_tracker.

operations.callback_text: Reads null_pop_out.points('P'), computes mean (mx, my, mz), EMA-lerps lookat_target.tx/ty/tz with alpha=0.04 (~0.4s time constant at 60fps).
operations.notes: par.active=True, par.framestart=True. Per attractor_chamber: alpha=0.04 feels cinematic, not jittery — Aizawa's instantaneous centroid wanders, EMA smooths it without losing tracking.
Camera now follows the cloud's wandering mass-center. As Aizawa evolves, lookat keeps cloud framed.

verified: render shows 3000 spheres lit by 4 cycling lights — wine/petrol/bronze/purple palette weights
lookat_target updates from (0,0,0) toward live centroid as SA evolves (verified at -0.003, -0.008, -0.020 after a few frames)
0 hard errors; 2 warnings cosmetic (POPX-internal sync warnings)
next_move: move_003 — bilateral mirror layout: render at 720x720 → flipTOP horizontal → side-by-side composite into 720x1280 portrait canvas with invisible centerline seam
